R0169.title: Oracle Manipulation
R0169.definition: Attackers manipulating external data provided by blockchain oracles to affect smart contracts and DeFi protocols that depend on that data.
R0169.description: Oracles provide off-chain data (such as prices, weather) to smart contracts. Attackers can manipulate data sources, attack oracle nodes, exploit price delays, or create false prices in low-liquidity markets to cause oracles to report incorrect data, leading to erroneous liquidations in DeFi protocols, incorrect price calculations, and profiting from these manipulations.
R0169.influence: DeFi protocol fund losses, users incorrectly liquidated, market pricing mechanisms fail.
